---
title: "Welcome"
---

Hello. Welcome to my personal website.

I was raised in Honduras and at the moment I am living in Germany. As of 07.2023 I am a doctoral researcher at the Cluster of Excellence, SimTech in Stuttgart. My supervisor is [Dr. Paul Bürkner](https://paul-buerkner.github.io)  Before, I studied a Master's degree in Probability and Statistics at the Center for Research in Mathematics [CIMAT](https://www.cimat.mx) in Guanajuato, Mexico under the supervision of [Dr.José Andrés Christen](https://www.cimat.mx/~jac/)

In general, I am interested in Bayesian Inference, Prior specification, Probabilistic Programming and High Dimensional Statistics.

Do not hesitate in contacting me if you ever want to work together or if you have doubts or comments about my work.
